config.script:
'sqlwhere_rs_lists_with_object #include "50102"
'HARUI_PRICE #include "50101"
'getglobprof #include "50203"
#include "50523"
dim nLimit:nLimit = 10
sub plug_produkt_podstawowe(byref pContainer,byval idProdukt)
dim pProdukt : set pProdukt = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,idProdukt)
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0
dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Indeks").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext pProdukt.strIndeks
#ifdef _IOW pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Oznaczenie producenta").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext pProdukt.strCecha1
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Nr SAP").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext pProdukt.strCecha2
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Nazwa angielska").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext pProdukt.prod_strNazwaObcojezyczna1
#endif
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Grupa produktów").element.bold = true set pTB.newcell.addtext(pProdukt.pGrupaProd.text).element.hli = _ doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_field_hli' vs1='pGrupaProd'")
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Jednostka ewidencyjna") pTB.newcell.addtext pProdukt.pJednostkaEwid.strNazwa
#ifdef _TORAL pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Położenie w magazynie").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext pProdukt.prod_strNazwaObcojezyczna3 #endif
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Stawka VAT") pTB.newcell.addtext vat2name(pProdukt.eVat)
#ifdef _GRAJEWSCY if Len(pProdukt.strIndeks) = 22 and pProdukt.prod_strNazwaObcojezyczna3 <> "" then dim arrCeny: arrCeny = split(pProdukt.prod_strNazwaObcojezyczna3,";")
'wysokość dim strWysokosc: strWysokosc = "" dim strRozmiarDoniczki: strRozmiarDoniczki = "" if Left(pProdukt.strIndeks,1) = "1" then 'cięte strWysokosc = Mid(pProdukt.strIndeks,14,3) elseif Left(pProdukt.strIndeks,1) = "2" then 'doniczkowe strRozmiarDoniczki = Mid(pProdukt.strIndeks,14,3) if UBound(arrCeny) > 4 then strWysokosc = ccur(arrCeny(5)) end if end if
dim curWysokosc: curWysokosc = ccur(0) if strWysokosc <> "" then curWysokosc = ccur(strWysokosc) end if pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Wysokość").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.quantity(curWysokosc,"",0)
'rozmiar doniczki if Left(pProdukt.strIndeks,1) = "2" and strRozmiarDoniczki <> "" then pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Rozmiar doniczki").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.quantity(ccur(strRozmiarDoniczki),"",0) end if
'ilość sztuk w paczce dim strIloscSztuk: strIloscSztuk = Mid(pProdukt.strIndeks,17,2) dim curIloscSztuk: curIloscSztuk = ccur(0) if strIloscSztuk <> "" then curIloscSztuk = ccur(strIloscSztuk) end if pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Ilość sztuk w paczce").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.quantity(curIloscSztuk,"",0)
'producent dim strProducent: strProducent = pProdukt.strCecha2 pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Producent").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext pProdukt.strCecha2
'kraj pochodzenia dim strKrajPochodzenia: strKrajPochodzenia = "" if not pProdukt.prod_pKrajPoch is nothing then strKrajPochodzenia = pProdukt.prod_pKrajPoch.strSkrot end if pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Kraj pochodzenia").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext strKrajPochodzenia
'kod opakowania dim pOpak: set pOpak = pProdukt.listOpakowania.get(1) dim strKodOpak: strKodOpak = pOpak.strKodOpak pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Kod opakowania").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext strKodOpak
dim curCenaPojemnika: curCenaPojemnika = ccur(0) dim curIloscSztukPojemnik: curIloscSztukPojemnik = ccur(0) dim curNarzut: curNarzut = ccur(0) dim curKosztyDodat: curKosztyDodat = ccur(0)
if UBound(arrCeny) > 4 then curCenaPojemnika = ccur(arrCeny(0)) curIloscSztukPojemnik = ccur(arrCeny(1)) curNarzut = ccur(arrCeny(2)) curKosztyDodat = ccur(arrCeny(3))
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Cena pojemnika").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.quantity(curCenaPojemnika,"",2) pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Ilość sztuk w pojemniku").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.quantity(curIloscSztukPojemnik,"",2) pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Narzut komisji [%]").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.quantity(curNarzut,"",0) pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Koszty dodatkowe").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.quantity(curKosztyDodat,"",0) end if
end if #endif
#ifdef _IOW dim pOpak : set pOpak = pProdukt.listOpakowania.get(1) pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Stan minimalny").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext doc_.afc.display.quantity(ccur(pOpak.curIloscMin),pOpak.pJednOpak.strSkrot,2) pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Stan maksymalny").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext doc_.afc.display.quantity(ccur(pOpak.curIloscMax),pOpak.pJednOpak.strSkrot,2) pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Adres magazynowy").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext pProdukt.prod_strNazwaObcojezyczna3 #endif
if not pProdukt.pUlotka is nothing then pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Rysunek").element.bold = true set pTB.newcell.addtext(pProdukt.pUlotka.text).element.hli = _ doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_field_hli' vs1='pUlotka'") end if if not pProdukt.pInstrukcja is nothing then pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Karta produktu").element.bold = true set pTB.newcell.addtext(pProdukt.pInstrukcja.text).element.hli = _ doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_field_hli' vs1='pInstrukcja'") end if end sub
sub plug_produkt_cechy(byref pContainer,byval idProdukt) dim pProdukt : set pProdukt = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,idProdukt)
if pProdukt.strCecha1="" and pProdukt.strCecha2="" and pProdukt.strCecha3="" then exit sub end if
#ifdef _IOW if pProdukt.strCecha3="" then exit sub end if #endif
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0 dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
#ifndef _IOW if pProdukt.strCecha1 <> "" then pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext "1: " + pProdukt.strCecha1 end if if pProdukt.strCecha2 <> "" then pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext "2: " + pProdukt.strCecha2 end if #endif
if pProdukt.strCecha3 <> "" then pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext "3: " + pProdukt.strCecha3 end if
end sub
sub plug_produkt_opis(byref pContainer,byval idProdukt) dim pProdukt : set pProdukt = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,idProdukt) if pProdukt.strOpis="" then exit sub end if
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0 dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable) pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext pProdukt.strOpis end sub
'getCurrentFirma #include "50203"
'kantor #include "50523"
function pokaz_przeliczenie (byref pTB , byval cena , byval waluta) dim curCena:curcena = cena dim strText if kantor(curCena, waluta, GetCurrentFirma().pWaluta, trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY), N5KURSWALUT_SPRZEDAZY, curCena) then strText = nx_.display.quantity(curCena,GetCurrentFirma().pWaluta.strSkrot,trans_.var(GVAR_PRICE_PREC)) pTB.newcell.addtext "="+strText else pTB.newcell.addtext "<brak kursu>" end if
end function
sub plug_produkt_opakowania(byref pContainer,byval idProdukt , byval bGenerujNazweOpak )
dim pProdukt : set pProdukt = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,idProdukt) dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0 dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
pPlugInTable.body.bordercolor = rgb(255,255,255) pPlugInTable.body.border = 1
dim idWaluta:idWaluta = GetCurrentFirma().pWaluta.idobj
pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.border = 0 pTB.newcell.addtext("Cena").newcell.addtext("netto").newcell.addtext("brutto") dim pElement for each pElement in pProdukt.listOpakowania
if bGenerujNazweOpak then pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext(pElement.strNazwa).cell.colspan=3 pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_CENTER pTB.element.bold = true end if
with doc_.afc.display if not HARUI_PRICE(UAR_DOSTEP_CENA_KARTOTEKOWA_1) then if getglobprofile(GLOBPROF_CENA1_NAME) <> "" then pTB.newrow pTB.newcell.addtext(getglobprofile(GLOBPROF_CENA1_NAME)) pTB.newcell.addtext(nx_.display.quantity(CCur(pElement.curCenaNetto1), pElement.pWaluta.strSkrot,trans_.var(GVAR_PRICE_PREC))).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext(nx_.display.quantity(CCur(pElement.curCenaBrutto1), pElement.pWaluta.strSkrot,trans_.var(GVAR_PRICE_PREC))).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT if pElement.pWaluta.idobj <> idWaluta then pokaz_przeliczenie pTB , pElement.curCenaBrutto1 , pElement.pWaluta end if end if end if if not HARUI_PRICE(UAR_DOSTEP_CENA_KARTOTEKOWA_2) then if getglobprofile(GLOBPROF_CENA2_NAME) <> "" then pTB.newrow pTB.newcell.addtext(getglobprofile(GLOBPROF_CENA2_NAME)) pTB.newcell.addtext(nx_.display.quantity(CCur(pElement.curCenaNetto2), pElement.opak_pWaluta2.strSkrot,trans_.var(GVAR_PRICE_PREC))).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext(nx_.display.quantity(CCur(pElement.curCenaBrutto2), pElement.opak_pWaluta2.strSkrot,trans_.var(GVAR_PRICE_PREC))).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT if pElement.opak_pWaluta2.idobj <> idWaluta then pokaz_przeliczenie pTB , pElement.curCenaBrutto2 , pElement.opak_pWaluta2 end if end if end if if not HARUI_PRICE(UAR_DOSTEP_CENA_KARTOTEKOWA_3) then if getglobprofile(GLOBPROF_CENA3_NAME) <> "" then pTB.newrow pTB.newcell.addtext(getglobprofile(GLOBPROF_CENA3_NAME)) pTB.newcell.addtext(nx_.display.quantity(CCur(pElement.curCenaNetto3), pElement.opak_pWaluta3.strSkrot,trans_.var(GVAR_PRICE_PREC))).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext(nx_.display.quantity(CCur(pElement.curCenaBrutto3), pElement.opak_pWaluta3.strSkrot,trans_.var(GVAR_PRICE_PREC))).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT if pElement.opak_pWaluta3.idobj <> idWaluta then pokaz_przeliczenie pTB , pElement.curCenaBrutto3 , pElement.opak_pWaluta3 end if end if end if if not HARUI_PRICE(UAR_DOSTEP_CENA_KARTOTEKOWA_4) then if getglobprofile(GLOBPROF_CENA4_NAME) <> "" then pTB.newrow pTB.newcell.addtext(getglobprofile(GLOBPROF_CENA4_NAME)) pTB.newcell.addtext(nx_.display.quantity(CCur(pElement.curCenaNetto4), pElement.opak_pWaluta4.strSkrot,trans_.var(GVAR_PRICE_PREC))).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext(nx_.display.quantity(CCur(pElement.curCenaBrutto4), pElement.opak_pWaluta4.strSkrot,trans_.var(GVAR_PRICE_PREC))).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT if pElement.opak_pWaluta4.idobj <> idWaluta then pokaz_przeliczenie pTB , pElement.curCenaBrutto4 , pElement.opak_pWaluta4 end if end if end if if not HARUI_PRICE(UAR_DOSTEP_CENA_KARTOTEKOWA_5) then if getglobprofile(GLOBPROF_CENA5_NAME) <> "" then pTB.newrow pTB.newcell.addtext(getglobprofile(GLOBPROF_CENA5_NAME)) pTB.newcell.addtext(nx_.display.quantity(CCur(pElement.curCenaNetto5), pElement.opak_pWaluta5.strSkrot,trans_.var(GVAR_PRICE_PREC))).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext(nx_.display.quantity(CCur(pElement.curCenaBrutto5), pElement.opak_pWaluta5.strSkrot,trans_.var(GVAR_PRICE_PREC))).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT if pElement.opak_pWaluta5.idobj <> idWaluta then pokaz_przeliczenie pTB , pElement.curCenaBrutto5 , pElement.opak_pWaluta5 end if end if end if if not HARUI_PRICE(UAR_DOSTEP_CENA_KARTOTEKOWA_6) then if getglobprofile(GLOBPROF_CENA6_NAME) <> "" then pTB.newrow pTB.newcell.addtext(getglobprofile(GLOBPROF_CENA6_NAME)) pTB.newcell.addtext(nx_.display.quantity(CCur(pElement.curCenaNetto6), pElement.opak_pWaluta6.strSkrot,trans_.var(GVAR_PRICE_PREC))).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext(nx_.display.quantity(CCur(pElement.curCenaBrutto6), pElement.opak_pWaluta6.strSkrot,trans_.var(GVAR_PRICE_PREC))).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT if pElement.opak_pWaluta6.idobj <> idWaluta then pokaz_przeliczenie pTB , pElement.curCenaBrutto6 , pElement.opak_pWaluta6 end if end if end if end with next end sub
sub plug_produkt_listy(byref pContainer,byval idProdukt)
dim pProdukt : set pProdukt = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,idProdukt) doc_.getmodule(60166).plug_listawyboru pContainer,pProdukt,nLimit
end sub
sub plug_produkt_promocje(byref pContainer,byval idProdukt)
dim pProdukt : set pProdukt = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,idProdukt)
dim cursor:set cursor = trans_.createrawcursor(TYPEID_N5POLRAB , pProdukt.n5produkt_sqlwhere_for_promotions , "strNazwaPromocji" , "") if not cursor.exists(1) then exit sub end if
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.body.bordercolor = rgb(255,255,255) pPlugInTable.body.border = 1
dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable) pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.border = 0 pTB.newcell.addtext("Nazwa").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Typ promocji").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Cena docelowa").element.bold = true pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext("Klienci").element.bold = true pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT
dim pProd, curCena dim elem dim strKlient for each elem in cursor pTB.newrow pTB.newcell.addtexthli elem.strNazwaPromocji , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='TYPEID_N5POLRAB' vn2='"+cstr(elem.idobj)+"'") if elem.eTyp = 1 then pTB.newcell.addtext "Cena końcowa netto " + doc_.afc.display.money(elem.curCenaRab, elem.polrab_pWalutaCeny.strSkrot) pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.money((elem.curCenaRab * 1.22), elem.polrab_pWalutaCeny.strSkrot)).cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT elseif elem.eTyp = 2 then pTB.newcell.addtext "Cena końcowa brutto " + doc_.afc.display.money(elem.curCenaRab, elem.polrab_pWalutaCeny.strSkrot) pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.money(elem.curCenaRab, elem.polrab_pWalutaCeny.strSkrot)).cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT elseif elem.eTyp = 3 then pTB.newcell.addtext "Rabat wyłączny " + doc_.afc.display.money(elem.curCenaRab, "%") set pProd = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,idProdukt) curCena = pProd.listOpakowania.get(1).curCenaBrutto1 pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.money(curCena - (elem.curCenaRab /100 ) * curCena, elem.polrab_pWalutaCeny.strSkrot)).cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT else pTB.newcell.addtext "Rabat addytywny " + doc_.afc.display.money(elem.curCenaRab, "%") set pProd = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,idProdukt) curCena = pProd.listOpakowania.get(1).curCenaBrutto1 pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.money(curCena - (elem.curCenaRab /100 ) * curCena, elem.polrab_pWalutaCeny.strSkrot)).cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT end if if elem.wpKlientGrupa is nothing then strKlient = "<dowolny>" else strKlient = elem.wpKlientGrupa.text end if pTB.newcell.addtext(strKlient) pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT next
end sub
function does_file_exist(byval strFileName) does_file_exist = false
dim fso: set fso = createobject("scripting.filesystemobject") if fso.FileExists(cstr(strFileName)) then does_file_exist = true end if end function
sub plug_produkt_pic(byref pContainer,byval idProdukt)
dim oProdukt : set oProdukt = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,idProdukt) dim pInputStream : set pInputStream = nothing
'check for local registry dim strExternalProductPicturePath strExternalProductPicturePath = doc_.system.registry(hKey_LocalMachine,_ "SOFTWARE\NAVO\NAVO2002\Applications\" + trans_.var(GVAR_APPLICATION), "ExternalProductPictureFolder")
if strExternalProductPicturePath <> "" then dim strExternalProductPictureExt strExternalProductPictureExt = doc_.system.registry(hKey_LocalMachine,_ "SOFTWARE\NAVO\NAVO2002\Applications\" + trans_.var(GVAR_APPLICATION), "ExternalProductPictureExt") dim strFilePath : strFilePath = strExternalProductPicturePath + oProdukt.strIndeks + strExternalProductPictureExt if does_file_exist(strFilePath) then set pInputStream = doc_.createstreamobj() pInputStream.attach strFilePath end if end if
if pInputStream is nothing then set pInputStream = oProdukt.fZdjecie end if
doc_.getmodule(60166).plug_picture pContainer, pInputStream, 5000, 5000
end sub
sub plug_produkt_zamienniki(byref pContainer,byval idProdukt)
dim pProdukt : set pProdukt = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,idProdukt) dim pPlugInTable dim pTB dim elem dim pZamiennik dim oRecordset dim nIdObj
dim bFirst:bFirst = true for each elem in pProdukt.listOpakowania if not elem.pZamiennik is nothing then if bFirst then bFirst = false set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0 set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable) 'zrob naglowek pTB.newrow pTB.newcell.addtext("Produkt").element.bold = true
' pTB.newcell.addtext("Opakowanie").element.bold = true ' pTB.newcell.addtext("Zamiennik dla").element.bold = true end if
'pobranie parenta zamiennika - nie wiem czemu elem.pZamiennik.parent nie dziala set oRecordset=trans_.createadors("select p_idobj from vlist_n5produkt_listopakowania where c_idobj = " + CStr(elem.pZamiennik.idobj)) if (oRecordset.eof) then trans_.message 7000,0,"błąd w collections" exit sub end if nIdObj = CLng( oRecordset.fields(0).value )
set pZamiennik = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,nIdObj) pTB.newrow.newcell.addtexthli pZamiennik.text , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='TYPEID_N5PRODUKT' vn2='"+cstr(pZamiennik.idobj)+"'") ' pTB.newcell.addtext elem.pZamiennik.text ' pTB.newcell.addtext elem.text end if next
#ifdef APPCONFIG_ZAMIENNIKI_EX set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0 set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable) 'zrob naglowek pTB.newrow pTB.newcell.addtext("Alternatywy").element.bold = true dim bSaAlternatywy : bSaAlternatywy = false
if not pProdukt.prod_pZamiennik1 is nothing then pTB.newrow.newcell.addtexthli pProdukt.prod_pZamiennik1.text ,_ doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='TYPEID_N5PRODUKT' vn2='"+cstr(pProdukt.prod_pZamiennik1.idobj)+"'") bSaAlternatywy = true end if
if not pProdukt.prod_pZamiennik2 is nothing then pTB.newrow.newcell.addtexthli pProdukt.prod_pZamiennik2.text ,_ doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='TYPEID_N5PRODUKT' vn2='"+cstr(pProdukt.prod_pZamiennik2.idobj)+"'") bSaAlternatywy = true end if
if not pProdukt.prod_pZamiennik3 is nothing then pTB.newrow.newcell.addtexthli pProdukt.prod_pZamiennik3.text ,_ doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='TYPEID_N5PRODUKT' vn2='"+cstr(pProdukt.prod_pZamiennik3.idobj)+"'") bSaAlternatywy = true end if
if not pProdukt.prod_pZamiennik4 is nothing then pTB.newrow.newcell.addtexthli pProdukt.prod_pZamiennik4.text ,_ doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='TYPEID_N5PRODUKT' vn2='"+cstr(pProdukt.prod_pZamiennik4.idobj)+"'") bSaAlternatywy = true end if
if not pProdukt.prod_pZamiennik5 is nothing then pTB.newrow.newcell.addtexthli pProdukt.prod_pZamiennik5.text ,_ doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='TYPEID_N5PRODUKT' vn2='"+cstr(pProdukt.prod_pZamiennik5.idobj)+"'") bSaAlternatywy = true end if
if not bSaAlternatywy then pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext "brak produktów alternatywnych" end if #endif end sub
sub plug_produkt_magazyny(byref pContainer,byval idProdukt , byval bGenerujNazweOpak)
dim pProdukt : set pProdukt = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,idProdukt) dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0 dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
pPlugInTable.body.bordercolor = rgb(255,255,255) pPlugInTable.body.border = 1
pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.border = 0 pTB.newcell.addtext("Magazyn").newcell.addtext("ilość")
dim pElement dim pOpakIlos set g_arrayIlosc = trans_.afc.new_navoarray()
for each pElement in pProdukt.listOpakowania
set pOpakIlos = new CIloscOpak pOpakIlos.m_idOpak = pElement.idobj pOpakIlos.m_strOpak = pElement.strNazwa pOpakIlos.m_curIlosc = ccur(0) set pOpakIlos.m_pJednostka = pElement.pJednOpak
if bGenerujNazweOpak then pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext(pElement.strNazwa).cell.colspan=2 pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_CENTER pTB.element.bold = true end if
dim crsr:set crsr = trans_.createadors( doc_.getmodule(60300).bqry_stan_mag_for_prod_opak( pProdukt.idobj , pElement.idobj , "-1")) dim ilosc,prec,skrot,magazyn if crsr.eof then pOpakIlos.m_curIlosc = ccur(0) pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext ("brak na magazynach") pTB.cell.colspan = 2 else while not crsr.eof ilosc = ccur(crsr.fields("c_ilosc_opak").value) pOpakIlos.m_curIlosc = pOpakIlos.m_curIlosc + ilosc
prec = clng(crsr.fields("c_prec_opak").value) - 1 skrot = cstr(crsr.fields("c_jedn_opak").value) magazyn = cstr(crsr.fields("c_mag").value) ilosc = doc_.afc.display.quantity(ilosc,skrot,prec) pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext(magazyn).newcell.addtext(ilosc) pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT crsr.movenext wend end if
g_arrayIlosc.add pOpakIlos
next
end sub
sub plug_produkt_sprzedaz(byref pContainer,byval idProdukt)
plug_produkt_dok_handl pContainer,idProdukt,TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ
end sub
sub plug_produkt_zakup(byref pContainer,byval idProdukt) if not HARUI(UAR_POKAZUJ_CENY_ZAKUPU) then exit sub end if
plug_produkt_dok_handl pContainer,idProdukt,TYPEID_N5ZAKUP
end sub
sub plug_produkt_zamowienia(byref pContainer,byval idProdukt)
dim pProdukt : set pProdukt = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,idProdukt)
dim oRecordset set oRecordset=trans_.createadors(sql_for_zam(pProdukt))
if oRecordset.eof then exit sub end if
#ifdef _PAKART 'gdy wszystkie zamówienia anulowane => nie wyświetlaj tabeli dim bCancel : bCancel = true do while not oRecordset.eof if ccur(oRecordset("ilosc_poz").value) <> ccur(0) then bCancel = false exit do end if oRecordset.movenext loop if bCancel then exit sub end if oRecordset.movefirst #endif
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0 dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
pPlugInTable.body.bordercolor = rgb(255,255,255) pPlugInTable.body.border = 1
#ifdef APPCONFIG_SHOW_ALL_DOKUM_ZAMOWIENIA_PROD if trans_.isvar(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM_PROD) then if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM_PROD) <> -1 then pTB.newrow pTB.newcell pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON,-1 with pTB.element .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON .text = "Wszystkie" set .hli = doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "ShowAllDokProd" .hli.prop(100) = 9 end with end if end if #endif
pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.border = 0 pTB.newcell.addtext("Data wyst.").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Numer dok.").element.bold = true
pTB.newcell.addtext("Klient").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Ilość zam.").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Ilość zreal.").element.bold = true #ifdef _ABAKOSTEEL pTB.newcell.addtext("Cena").element.bold = true #endif
do while not oRecordset.eof #ifdef _PAKART if ccur(oRecordset("ilosc_poz").value) <> ccur(0) then #endif pTB.newrow #ifdef _DREWTUR if ccur(oRecordset.fields("ilosc").value) = ccur(oRecordset.fields("ilosc_z").value) then pTB.row.strike = true end if #endif pTB.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.fulldate(oRecordset.fields("data").value) pTB.newcell.addtexthli cstr(oRecordset.fields("nr").value) , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE' vn2='"+cstr(oRecordset.fields("id").value)+"'") dim strKlient : strKlient = cstr(oRecordset.fields("c_klient_nazwa").value) if len(strKlient) >= 48 then strKlient = left(strKlient,45) + "..." end if dim idKlient : idKlient = clng(oRecordset.fields("c_klient_idobj").value) pTB.newcell.addtexthli strKlient, doc_.createhlistr( _ "varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='TYPEID_N5KLIENT' vn2='"+cstr(idKlient)+"'")
pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.quantity(oRecordset.fields("ilosc").value , oRecordset.fields("je").value , oRecordset.fields("je_prec").value - 1)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT
pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.quantity(oRecordset.fields("ilosc_z").value , oRecordset.fields("je").value , oRecordset.fields("je_prec").value - 1)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT
#ifdef _ABAKOSTEEL pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.money(ccur(oRecordset.fields("cena_zam").value),oRecordset.fields("wal").value)).cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT #endif
#ifdef _PAKART end if #endif oRecordset.movenext loop
'plug_produkt_dok_handl pContainer,idProdukt,TYPEID_N5ZAKUP
end sub

#ifdef _ABAKUS if bOgraniczDostep then strKlient = cstr(oRecordset.fields("gk_nazwa").value) if len(strKlient) >= 48 then strKlient = left(strKlient,45) + "..." end if end if #endif

pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.quantity(oRecordset.fields("ilosc_z").value , oRecordset.fields("je").value , oRecordset.fields("je_prec").value - 1)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT
#ifdef _ABAKOSTEEL pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.money(ccur(oRecordset.fields("cena_zam").value),oRecordset.fields("wal").value)).cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT #endif
oRecordset.movenext loop
'plug_produkt_dok_handl pContainer,idProdukt,TYPEID_N5ZAKUP

sub plug_produkt_kody_indywidualne(byref pContainer,byval idProdukt)
'pobierz kody indywidualne dim strSQL : strSQL = "select 'k_nazwa'=k.strNazwa,'kp_indeks'=kp.klpr_strIndeks,'kp_nazwa'=kp.klpr_strNazwa " +_ "from n5klient_produkt kp inner join n5klient k on kp.klpr_pKlient = k.idobj " +_ "where kp.klpr_pProdukt = " + cstr(idProdukt)
dim oRS : set oRS = trans_.createadors(strSQL) dim bIsRec : bIsRec = false if oRS.RecordCount <> 0 then bIsRec = true end if
if bISRec then dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
pPlugInTable.body.bordercolor = rgb(255,255,255) pPlugInTable.body.border = 1
'header pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.border = 0 pTB.newcell.addtext "Lp" pTB.cell.width = clng(500) pTB.newcell.addtext "Nazwa klienta" pTB.cell.width = clng(6000) pTB.newcell.addtext "Indeks obcy" pTB.cell.width = clng(2000) pTB.newcell.addtext "Nazwa obca" pTB.cell.width = clng(3000)
'body dim iter dim iRowNr : iRowNr = 1 do while not oRS.EOF pTB.newrow pTB.row.border = 1 pTB.newcell.addtext(cstr(iRowNr)).cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell pTB.addctrl(CTRL_TYPE_STATICEX,-1).element.text = cstr(oRS("k_nazwa")) pTB.newcell pTB.addctrl(CTRL_TYPE_STATICEX,-1).element.text = cstr(oRS("kp_indeks")) pTB.newcell pTB.addctrl(CTRL_TYPE_STATICEX,-1).element.text = cstr(oRS("kp_nazwa")) iRowNr = iRowNr + 1 oRS.movenext loop else exit sub end if end sub

if bISRec then dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)

'body dim iter dim iRowNr : iRowNr = 1 do while not oRS.EOF pTB.newrow pTB.row.border = 1 pTB.newcell.addtext(cstr(iRowNr)).cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT dim idDok : idDok = clng(oRS("id_dok").value) pTB.newcell.addtexthli cstr(oRS("nr_dok").value), doc_.createhlistr( _ "varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='TYPEID_N5DOKMAG' vn2='" + cstr(idDok) + "'") pTB.newcell pTB.addctrl(CTRL_TYPE_STATICEX,-1).element.text = cstr(oRS("kw_nazwa")) iRowNr = iRowNr + 1 oRS.movenext loop else exit sub end if end sub
sub plug_produkt_dokmag_PP(byref pContainer,byval idProdukt) dim strSQL strSQL = "select distinct top 20 'id_dok'=vdm.p_idobj,'nr_dok'=vdm.p_strnrdok, 'data_wyst'=vdm.p_ddatawyst, " + vbNewLine +_ "'ilosc_opak'=vdm.c_curiloscopak,'skrot_jedn'=j.strSkrot,'dokladnosc'=j.nDokladnosc, " + vbNewLine +_ "'nr_oper'=vdm.p_nnumoper,'mag_zrod'=vdm.p_pmagzrod,'id_prod'=c_pprodukt,'id_opak'=c_popak " + vbNewLine +_ "from vlist_n5dokmag_listPozycje vdm " + vbNewLine +_ "inner join n5opakowanie_produktu op on vdm.c_popak = op.idobj " + vbNewLine +_ "inner join n5jednostka j on op.pJednOpak = j.idobj " + vbNewLine +_ "where p_ntypdok = N5REJESTRDOK__PP and c_pprodukt = " + cstr(idProdukt) + vbNewLine +_ "order by vdm.p_ddatawyst desc"
dim oRS : set oRS = trans_.createadors(strSQL) dim bIsRec : bIsRec = false if oRS.RecordCount <> 0 then bIsRec = true end if
if bISRec then dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
pPlugInTable.body.bordercolor = rgb(255,255,255) pPlugInTable.body.border = 1
'header pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.border = 0 pTB.newcell.addtext "Numer dok." pTB.cell.width = clng(MAXIMIZE_SIZE) pTB.newcell.addtext "Data wyst." pTB.cell.width = clng(2000) pTB.newcell.addtext "Ilość" pTB.cell.width = clng(2000) pTB.newcell.addtext "Cena" pTB.cell.width = clng(2000)
'body dim iter do while not oRS.EOF strSQL = "select gmo_curCena from n5gmop " + vbNewLine +_ "join vlist_n5produkt_listOpakowania on gmo_pProd = p_idobj and gmo_pOpak = c_idobj " + vbNewLine +_ "left join n5magazyn on n5magazyn.idobj = gmo_pMag " + vbNewLine +_ "where gmo_nNumOp = " + CStr(oRS("nr_oper").value) + " and gmo_pMag = " + CStr(oRS("mag_zrod").value) + vbNewLine +_ "and gmo_pProd = " + CStr(oRS("id_prod").value) + " and gmo_pOpak = " + CStr(oRS("id_opak").value) dim oRSCena : set oRSCena = trans_.createadors(strSQL) dim curCena : curCena = CCur(0) if oRSCena.recordCount > clng(0) then curCena = CCur(oRSCena(0).value) end if pTB.newrow pTB.row.border = 1 dim idDok : idDok = clng(oRS("id_dok").value) pTB.newcell.addtexthli cstr(oRS("nr_dok").value), doc_.createhlistr( _ "varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='TYPEID_N5DOKMAG' vn2='" + cstr(idDok) + "'") pTB.newcell.addtext doc_.afc.display.fulldate(oRS("data_wyst").value) pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.quantity(ccur(oRS("ilosc_opak").value),cstr(oRS("skrot_jedn").value),clng(oRS("dokladnosc").value)-1)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.money(ccur(curCena),"")).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT oRS.movenext loop else exit sub end if end sub
sub plug_produkt_opak(byref pContainer,byval idProdukt) dim strSQL strSQL = "select 'nazwa_opak'=c_strnazwa,'ilosc'=c_curilosc,'skrot_jedn'=j.strSkrot,'dokladnosc'=j.nDokladnosc " + vbNewLine +_ "from vlist_n5produkt_listOpakowania " + vbNewLine +_ "inner join n5jednostka j on c_pjednopak = j.idobj " + vbNewLine +_ "where p_idobj = " + cstr(idProdukt)
dim oRS : set oRS = trans_.createadors(strSQL) dim bIsRec : bIsRec = false if oRS.RecordCount <> 0 then bIsRec = true end if

pPlugInTable.body.bordercolor = rgb(255,255,255) pPlugInTable.body.border = 1

'body dim iter do while not oRS.EOF pTB.newrow pTB.row.border = 1 pTB.newcell.addtext CStr(oRS("nazwa_opak").value) pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.quantity(ccur(oRS("ilosc").value),cstr(oRS("skrot_jedn").value),clng(oRS("dokladnosc").value)-1)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT oRS.movenext loop else exit sub end if end sub
sub plug_produkt_zam_wlasne(byref pContainer,byval idProdukt,byval bGenerujNazweOpak)
dim pProdukt : set pProdukt = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,idProdukt)
dim oRecordset: set oRecordset=trans_.createadors( sql_for_zamwlasne(pProdukt) )
if oRecordset.eof then exit sub end if
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0 dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
pPlugInTable.body.bordercolor = rgb(255,255,255) pPlugInTable.body.border = 1
pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.border = 0
pTB.newcell.addtext("Termin dostawy").element.bold = true if bGenerujNazweOpak then pTB.newcell.addtext("Opakowanie").element.bold = true end if pTB.newcell.addtext("Ilość").element.bold = true pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT
'dostepne teraz dim iter_ilosc if not g_arrayIlosc is nothing then for iter_ilosc = 0 to g_arrayIlosc.UpperIndex() pTB.newrow.row.styleitem = STYLE_OPER_FRAME
pTB.newcell.addtext "Dostępne teraz" if bGenerujNazweOpak then pTB.newcell.addtext g_arrayIlosc.value(iter_ilosc).m_strOpak end if pTB.newcell.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.addtext trans_.afc.display.quantity(g_arrayIlosc.value(iter_ilosc).m_curIlosc , g_arrayIlosc.value(iter_ilosc).m_pJednostka.strSkrot , g_arrayIlosc.value(iter_ilosc).m_pJednostka.nDokladnosc - 1 ) g_arrayIlosc.value(iter_ilosc).m_curIlosc = ccur(0) next end if
dim iter:iter = 1 dim pPlugInTableAdd:set pPlugInTableAdd = nothing dim pTBAdd
dim pCurrTB dim currSuma:currSuma = ccur(0) 'dim pTmpIloscOpak
while not oRecordset.eof
set pCurrTB = pTB
'if iter > 5 then ' set pTmpIloscOpak = get_by_opak(clng(oRecordset.fields("c_pOpak").value)) ' pTmpIloscOpak.m_curIlosc = pTmpIloscOpak.m_curIlosc + ccur(oRecordset.fields("ilosc").value) 'else
dim iDays : iDays = clng(cdate(oRecordset.fields("data").value) - cdate(trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY)))
pCurrTB.newrow if iDays < 0 then pCurrTB.row.forecolor = rgb(255,0,0) end if pCurrTB.newcell dim strDzien if cdate(oRecordset.fields("data").value) - cdate(trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY)) <> 1 then strDzien = "dni" else strDzien = "dzień" end if dim strDayText : strDayText = trans_.afc.display.fulldate(oRecordset.fields("data").value)
if iDays > 0 then strDayText = strDayText + " (+" else strDayText = strDayText + " (" end if strDayText = strDayText + cstr(iDays) + " " + strDzien + ")"
pCurrTB.addtext strDayText
pCurrTB.element.size = 20 if bGenerujNazweOpak then pCurrTB.newcell.addtext oRecordset.fields("opak").value end if #ifdef _ABAKUS pCurrTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.quantity(ccur(oRecordset.fields("ilosc_wlasne").value) - ccur(oRecordset.fields("ilosc_obce").value), oRecordset.fields("je").value , oRecordset.fields("je_prec").value - 1)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT #else pCurrTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.quantity(oRecordset.fields("ilosc").value , oRecordset.fields("je").value , oRecordset.fields("je_prec").value - 1)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT #endif 'end if
oRecordset.movenext iter = iter + 1 wend
if not g_arrayIlosc is nothing then for iter_ilosc = 0 to g_arrayIlosc.UpperIndex() pTB.newrow.row.styleitem = STYLE_OPER_FRAME
pTB.newcell.addtext "Dostępne poźniej" if bGenerujNazweOpak then pTB.newcell.addtext g_arrayIlosc.value(iter_ilosc).m_strOpak end if pTB.newcell.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.addtext trans_.afc.display.quantity(g_arrayIlosc.value(iter_ilosc).m_curIlosc , g_arrayIlosc.value(iter_ilosc).m_pJednostka.strSkrot , g_arrayIlosc.value(iter_ilosc).m_pJednostka.nDokladnosc - 1 ) next end if
end sub
sub plug_produkt_dok_handl(byref pContainer,byval idProdukt,byval typeId)
dim strDokHandl,strDokHandlPoz,idColl
dim pProdukt : set pProdukt = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,idProdukt)
dim sql_for_sprzedaz:sql_for_sprzedaz = sql_for_dok_handl(pProdukt , typeId)
dim oRecordset set oRecordset=trans_.createadors(sql_for_sprzedaz)
if oRecordset.eof then exit sub end if
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0 dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
pPlugInTable.body.bordercolor = rgb(255,255,255) pPlugInTable.body.border = 1
#ifdef APPCONFIG_SHOW_ALL_DOKUM_SPRZEDAZ_PROD if trans_.isvar(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM_PROD) then if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM_PROD) <> -1 and typeId = TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ then pTB.newrow pTB.newcell pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON,-1 with pTB.element .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON .text = "Wszystkie" set .hli = doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "ShowAllDokProd" .hli.prop(100) = 6 end with #ifdef _ABAKOSTEEL pTB.newcell pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON,-1 with pTB.element .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON .text = "12 m-cy" set .hli = doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "ShowAllDokProd" .hli.prop(100) = 6 .hli.prop(101) = 1 end with #endif end if end if #endif
#ifdef APPCONFIG_SHOW_ALL_DOKUM_ZAKUP_PROD if trans_.isvar(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM_PROD) then if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM_PROD) <> -1 and typeId = TYPEID_N5ZAKUP then pTB.newrow pTB.newcell pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON,-1 with pTB.element .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON .text = "Wszystkie" set .hli = doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "ShowAllDokProd" .hli.prop(100) = 7 end with end if end if #endif
pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.border = 0 pTB.newcell.addtext("Data wyst.").element.bold = true #ifdef _ABAKOSTEEL if typeId = TYPEID_N5ZAKUP then pTB.newcell.addtext("Data dost.").element.bold = true end if #endif pTB.newcell.addtext("Numer dok.").element.bold = true dim strHeader if typeId = TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ then strHeader = "Klient" else strHeader = "Dostawca" #ifdef _ABAKUS dim bOgraniczDostep: bOgraniczDostep = false if HARUI_FREE(UAR_OGRANICZONY_DOSTEP_DANE_KLIENTA) then bOgraniczDostep = true strHeader = "Grupa dostawców" end if #endif end if
pTB.newcell.addtext(strHeader).element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Ilość").element.bold = true if not HARUI_PRICE(UAR_DOSTEP_CENA_KARTOTEKOWA_1) then pTB.newcell.addtext("Cena").element.bold = true #ifdef _ALMA_TREND if typeId = TYPEID_N5ZAKUP then pTB.newcell.addtext("Opłaty dodatkowe").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Opłaty dod. PLN").element.bold = true end if #endif end if
do while not oRecordset.eof pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.fulldate(oRecordset.fields("data").value)
#ifdef _ABAKOSTEEL if typeId = TYPEID_N5ZAKUP then pTB.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.fulldate(oRecordset.fields("data_zakupu").value) end if #endif
if not HARUI_PRICE(UAR_DOSTEP_CENA_KARTOTEKOWA_1) then pTB.newcell.addtexthli cstr(oRecordset.fields("nr").value) , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='"+cstr(typeId)+"' vn2='"+cstr(oRecordset.fields("id").value)+"'") else pTB.newcell.addtext cstr(oRecordset.fields("nr").value) end if dim strKlient : strKlient = cstr(oRecordset.fields("c_klient_nazwa").value) if len(strKlient) >= 48 then strKlient = left(strKlient,45) + "..." end if
#ifdef _ABAKUS if bOgraniczDostep then strKlient = cstr(oRecordset.fields("gk_nazwa").value) if len(strKlient) >= 48 then strKlient = left(strKlient,45) + "..." end if end if #endif
dim idKlient : idKlient = clng(oRecordset.fields("c_klient_idobj").value) #ifdef _ABAKUS if bOgraniczDostep then pTB.newcell.addtext(strKlient) else pTB.newcell.addtexthli strKlient, doc_.createhlistr( _ "varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='TYPEID_N5KLIENT' vn2='"+cstr(idKlient)+"'") end if #else pTB.newcell.addtexthli strKlient, doc_.createhlistr( _ "varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='TYPEID_N5KLIENT' vn2='"+cstr(idKlient)+"'") #endif
pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.quantity(oRecordset.fields("ilosc").value , oRecordset.fields("je").value , oRecordset.fields("je_prec").value - 1)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT #ifdef _CTP dim curKursVat:curkursVat = oRecordset.fields("curKursVatDok").value dim curKursPD :curKursPD = oRecordset.fields("curKursPDDok").value dim curKursGL if ccur(curKursPD) > ccur(0) then curKursGL = ccur(curKursPD)/10000 else curKursGL = ccur(curKursVat) end if
pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.money(ccur(oRecordset.fields("cena").value) * curKursGL , getCurrentFirma().pWaluta.strSkrot )).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT #else if not HARUI_PRICE(UAR_DOSTEP_CENA_KARTOTEKOWA_1) then pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.money(oRecordset.fields("cena").value , oRecordset.fields("wal").value )).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT #ifdef _ALMA_TREND if typeId = TYPEID_N5ZAKUP then pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.money(trans_.afc.convert.round2(oRecordset.fields("OplatyZagr").value) , oRecordset.fields("wal").value )).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.money(trans_.afc.convert.round2(oRecordset.fields("OplatyKraj").value) , "PLN" )).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT end if #endif end if #endif oRecordset.movenext loop
end sub
sub plug_produkt_rozchody(byref pContainer,byval idProdukt)
dim pProdukt : set pProdukt = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,idProdukt)
dim oRecordset set oRecordset=trans_.createadors(sql_for_rozchody_przychody(pProdukt,true))
if oRecordset.eof then exit sub end if
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0 dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
pPlugInTable.body.bordercolor = rgb(255,255,255) pPlugInTable.body.border = 1
if trans_.isvar(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM_PROD) then if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM_PROD) <> -1 then pTB.newrow pTB.newcell pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON,-1 with pTB.element .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON .text = "Wszystkie" set .hli = doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "ShowAllDokMag" .hli.prop(100) = 12 end with end if end if
pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.border = 0 pTB.newcell.addtext("Data wyst.").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Klient").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Ilość").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Numer dok.").element.bold = true
do while not oRecordset.eof pTB.newrow pTB.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.fulldate(oRecordset.fields("datawyst").value)
dim strKlient : strKlient = cstr(oRecordset.fields("klient").value) if len(strKlient) >= 48 then strKlient = left(strKlient,45) + "..." end if dim idKlient : idKlient = clng(oRecordset.fields("klientid").value) pTB.newcell.addtexthli strKlient, doc_.createhlistr( _ "varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='TYPEID_N5KLIENT' vn2='"+cstr(idKlient)+"'")
pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.quantity(oRecordset.fields("ilosc").value , oRecordset.fields("je").value , oRecordset.fields("je_prec").value - 1)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtexthli cstr(oRecordset.fields("nrdok").value) , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='TYPEID_N5DOKMAG' vn2='"+cstr(oRecordset.fields("iddok").value)+"'")
oRecordset.movenext loop
end sub
sub plug_produkt_przychody(byref pContainer,byval idProdukt)
dim pProdukt : set pProdukt = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,idProdukt)
dim oRecordset set oRecordset=trans_.createadors(sql_for_rozchody_przychody(pProdukt,false))
if oRecordset.eof then exit sub end if
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0 dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
pPlugInTable.body.bordercolor = rgb(255,255,255) pPlugInTable.body.border = 1
if trans_.isvar(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM_PROD) then if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM_PROD) <> -1 then pTB.newrow pTB.newcell pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON,-1 with pTB.element .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON .text = "Wszystkie" set .hli = doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "ShowAllDokMag" .hli.prop(100) = 13 end with end if end if
pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.border = 0 pTB.newcell.addtext("Data wyst.").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Klient").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Ilość").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Numer dok.").element.bold = true
do while not oRecordset.eof pTB.newrow pTB.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.fulldate(oRecordset.fields("datawyst").value)
dim strKlient : strKlient = cstr(oRecordset.fields("klient").value) if len(strKlient) >= 48 then strKlient = left(strKlient,45) + "..." end if dim idKlient : idKlient = clng(oRecordset.fields("klientid").value) pTB.newcell.addtexthli strKlient, doc_.createhlistr( _ "varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='TYPEID_N5KLIENT' vn2='"+cstr(idKlient)+"'")
pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.quantity(oRecordset.fields("ilosc").value , oRecordset.fields("je").value , oRecordset.fields("je_prec").value - 1)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtexthli cstr(oRecordset.fields("nrdok").value) , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='TYPEID_N5DOKMAG' vn2='"+cstr(oRecordset.fields("iddok").value)+"'")
oRecordset.movenext loop
end sub
function sql_for_rozchody_przychody(byval pProdukt, byval bOption)
dim nLimit: nLimit = APPCONFIG_PLUGIN_RAPORT_ROW_COUNT
if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM_PROD) = 12 or trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM_PROD) = 13 then nLimit = 9999 end if
'domyślnie przychody dim strZnak: strZnak = ">" dim strRejType: strRejType = "N5REJESTRDOK__PZ,N5REJESTRDOK__ZZ,N5REJESTRDOK__PW,N5REJESTRDOK__RP,N5REJESTRDOK__PP,N5REJESTRDOK__MM,N5REJESTRDOK__MP,N5REJESTRDOK__IP,N5REJESTRDOK_REZERWACJE,N5REJESTRDOK_ZAK_REZERWACJI,N5REJESTRDOK__KWZ" if bOption then 'rozchody strZnak = "<" strRejType = "N5REJESTRDOK__WZ,N5REJESTRDOK__ZD,N5REJESTRDOK__RW, N5REJESTRDOK__RP,N5REJESTRDOK__PP,N5REJESTRDOK__MM,N5REJESTRDOK__MR,N5REJESTRDOK__IR,N5REJESTRDOK_REZERWACJE,N5REJESTRDOK_ZAK_REZERWACJI,N5REJESTRDOK__KWZ" end if
sql_for_rozchody_przychody = doc_.afc.convert.formatter( _ "select top " + CStr(nLimit) + " " +_ "'nrdok'=max(v_dok.p_strNrDok),'typeid'=TYPEID_N5DOKMAG,'iddok'=max(v_dok.p_idobj), " +_ "'datawyst'=max(v_dok.p_dDataWyst),'ilosc'= sum(abs(t_op.gmo_curIlosc)), " +_ "'klient'=max(k.strNazwa),'klientid'=max(k.IdObj),'klient_typeid'=TYPEID_N5KLIENT " +_ ",'je'=max(jednostka.strSkrot),'je_prec'=max(jednostka.nDokladnosc) " +_ "from vlist_n5dokmag_listPozycje v_dok " +_ "inner join n5klient k on v_dok.p_pklient = k.IdObj " +_ "inner join n5gmop t_op on t_op.gmo_nLP = v_dok.coll_lp and t_op.gmo_nnumop=v_dok.p_nNumOper " +_ "inner join n5produkt prod on v_dok.c_pprodukt=prod.idobj " +_ "join n5opakowanie_produktu on v_dok.c_pOpak = n5opakowanie_produktu.idobj " +_ "join n5jednostka as jednostka on n5opakowanie_produktu.pJednOpak = jednostka.idobj " +_ "where (v_dok.p_pRejestrDok IN " +_ "(select IdObj from n5rejestrdok where eTyp in (" + strRejType + "))) and " +_ "t_op.gmo_curIlosc " + strZnak + " 0.0 and v_dok.c_pprodukt = %1 " +_ "group by t_op.gmo_nNumOp " +_ "order by datawyst desc") _ .add(CStr(pProdukt.idobj)) _ .done() end function
function sql_for_dok_handl(byval pProdukt , byval nTypeID)
dim strDokHandl dim strCenaFld dim strKlientFld dim curOplatyZagr: curOplatyZagr = "" dim strWhere: strWhere = ""
select case nTypeID case TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ strDokHandl = "vlist_n5sprzedaz_listPozycje" strCenaFld = "c_curCenaNettoWal" strKlientFld = "p_pKlient" #ifdef ENABLE_DB12 strWhere = "and p_prejestrDok not in (select idobj from n5rejestrdok where eTyp in (N5REJESTRDOK_DOSTAWA, N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_DOSTAWA)) " #endif #ifdef _ABAKUS if HARUI_FREE(UAR_OGRANICZONY_DOSTEP_DANE_KLIENTA) then strWhere = strWhere +_ "and klient.IdObj in " + _ "(select IdObj from n5klient where pPracownik in " + _ "(select n5pracownik.idobj from n5uzytkownik " + _ "inner join n5wykonawca on n5uzytkownik.pWykonawca = n5wykonawca.idobj " + _ "inner join n5pracownik on n5wykonawca.wrefObiekt = n5pracownik.idobj and n5wykonawca.wrefObiekt_wrt = TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK " + _ "where n5uzytkownik.idobj = " + CStr(getCurrentUserID()) + ")) " end if #endif #ifdef _ABAKOSTEEL #ifdef APPCONFIG_SHOW_ALL_DOKUM_SPRZEDAZ_PROD if trans_.var(GVAR_SPRZEDAZ_LAST_12_MONTHS) = 1 then strWhere = strWhere + " and t_dokhandl.p_dDataWyst >= " + trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dateadd("m",-12,trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY))) end if #endif #endif case TYPEID_N5ZAKUP strDokHandl = "vlist_n5zakup_listPozycje" strCenaFld = "c_curCenaNettoWal" strKlientFld = "p_pDostawca" #ifdef _ALMA_TREND curOplatyZagr = ",case when sum(c_curIloscOpak) = 0 then 0 else max(c_curoplatyzagr)/ sum(c_curIloscOpak) end as OplatyZagr " +_ ",case when sum(c_curclo + c_curakcyza + c_curoplatykraj) = 0 then 0 else sum(c_curclo + c_curakcyza + c_curoplatykraj)/sum(c_curIloscOpak) end as OplatyKraj " #endif end select
dim nLimit: nLimit = APPCONFIG_PLUGIN_RAPORT_ROW_COUNT
#ifdef APPCONFIG_SHOW_ALL_DOKUM_SPRZEDAZ_PROD if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM_PROD) = 6 or trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM_PROD) = 7 then nLimit = 9999 end if #endif dim strSQL strSQL = "select top " + CStr(nLimit) + vbNewLine +_ "p_strNrDok as nr , " + _ "max(p_dDataWyst) as data, "
if nTypeID = TYPEID_N5ZAKUP then strSQL = strSQL + "max(p_dDataZakupu) as data_zakupu, " end if
strSQL = strSQL + "max(p_idobj) as id, " + _ "n5opakowanie_produktu.strNazwa as opak , " + _ "sum(c_curIloscOpak) as ilosc , " + _ "%3 as cena ," + _ "max(jednostka.strSkrot) as je ," + _ "max(klient.strNazwa) as c_klient_nazwa, " + _ "max(%4) as c_klient_idobj, " + _ "max(jednostka.nDokladnosc) as je_prec ," + _ "max(waluta.strSkrot) as wal ," + _ "max(t_dokhandl.p_curkurs) as curKursVatDok ," + _ "max(t_dokhandl.p_curextra4) as curKursPDDok " + curOplatyZagr + _ #ifdef _ABAKUS ",'gk_nazwa'=max(gk.strNazwa) " +_ #endif "from %1 as t_dokhandl " + _ "join n5opakowanie_produktu on t_dokhandl.c_pOpak = n5opakowanie_produktu.idobj " + _ "join n5jednostka as jednostka on n5opakowanie_produktu.pJednOpak = jednostka.idobj " + _ "join n5jednostka as waluta on t_dokhandl.p_pWaluta = waluta.idobj " + _ "join n5klient as klient on t_dokhandl.%4 = klient.idobj " +_ #ifdef _ABAKUS " join n5grupaklient gk on klient.pGrupaKlient = gk.IdObj " +_ #endif "where t_dokhandl.c_pProdukt = %2 " + _ strWhere +_ "group by n5opakowanie_produktu.strNazwa , %3 , p_strNrDok "
if nTypeID = TYPEID_N5ZAKUP then strSQL = strSQL + "order by max(p_dDataZakupu) desc , p_strNrDok , n5opakowanie_produktu.strNazwa , %3 " else strSQL = strSQL + "order by max(p_dDataWyst) desc , p_strNrDok , n5opakowanie_produktu.strNazwa , %3 " end if
sql_for_dok_handl = doc_.afc.convert.formatter(strSQL) _ .add(strDokHandl) _ .add(CStr(pProdukt.idobj)) _ .add(strCenaFld) _ .add(strKlientFld) _ .done()
end function
function sql_for_oferty_wl(byval pProdukt)
#ifdef _ABAKUS dim strWhere: strWhere = "" if HARUI_FREE(UAR_OGRANICZONY_DOSTEP_DANE_KLIENTA) then strWhere = _ "and klient.IdObj in " + _ "(select IdObj from n5klient where pPracownik in " + _ "(select n5pracownik.idobj from n5uzytkownik " + _ "inner join n5wykonawca on n5uzytkownik.pWykonawca = n5wykonawca.idobj " + _ "inner join n5pracownik on n5wykonawca.wrefObiekt = n5pracownik.idobj and n5wykonawca.wrefObiekt_wrt = TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK " + _ "where n5uzytkownik.idobj = " + CStr(getCurrentUserID()) + ")) " end if #endif
sql_for_oferty_wl = doc_.afc.convert.formatter( _ "select top 10 " + _ "p_strNrDok as nr , " + _ "p_dDataWyst as data, " + _ "p_idobj as id, " + _ "n5opakowanie_produktu.strNazwa as opak , " + _ "c_curIloscOpak as ilosc , " + _ "c_curcenanettowal as cena, " +_ "c_pzam_curIloscOpakZreal as ilosc_z , " + _ "jednostka.strSkrot as je ," + _ "klient.strNazwa as c_klient_nazwa, " + _ "p_pKlient as c_klient_idobj, " + _ "jednostka.nDokladnosc as je_prec ," + _ "waluta.strSkrot as wal " + _ "from vlist_n5zamowienie_listPozycje as t_dokhandl " + _ "join n5opakowanie_produktu on t_dokhandl.c_pOpak = n5opakowanie_produktu.idobj " + _ "join n5jednostka as jednostka on n5opakowanie_produktu.pJednOpak = jednostka.idobj " + _ "join n5jednostka as waluta on t_dokhandl.p_pWaluta = waluta.idobj " + _ "join n5klient as klient on t_dokhandl.p_pKlient = klient.idobj " +_ "where t_dokhandl.c_pProdukt = %1 and c_curIloscOpak <> c_pzam_curIloscOpakZreal " + _ "and p_pRejestrDok in (select idobj from n5rejestrdok where eTyp = N5REJESTRDOK_OFERTY_WLASNE) " + _ #ifdef _ABAKUS strWhere +_ #endif "order by p_dDataWyst desc , p_strNrDok , n5opakowanie_produktu.strNazwa ") _ .add(CStr(pProdukt.idobj)) _ .done() end function
function sql_for_zam(byval pProdukt)
#ifdef _ABAKUS dim strWhere: strWhere = "" if HARUI_FREE(UAR_OGRANICZONY_DOSTEP_DANE_KLIENTA) then strWhere = _ "and klient.IdObj in " + _ "(select IdObj from n5klient where pPracownik in " + _ "(select n5pracownik.idobj from n5uzytkownik " + _ "inner join n5wykonawca on n5uzytkownik.pWykonawca = n5wykonawca.idobj " + _ "inner join n5pracownik on n5wykonawca.wrefObiekt = n5pracownik.idobj and n5wykonawca.wrefObiekt_wrt = TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK " + _ "where n5uzytkownik.idobj = " + CStr(getCurrentUserID()) + ")) " end if #endif
dim nLimit: nLimit = APPCONFIG_PLUGIN_RAPORT_ROW_COUNT
#ifdef APPCONFIG_SHOW_ALL_DOKUM_ZAMOWIENIA_PROD if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM_PROD) = 9 then nLimit = 9999 end if #endif
sql_for_zam = doc_.afc.convert.formatter( _ #ifdef _IOW "select top APPCONFIG_PLUGIN_RAPORT_ROW_COUNT " + _ #else #ifdef APPCONFIG_SHOW_ALL_DOKUM_ZAMOWIENIA_PROD "select top " + CStr(nLimit) + " " + _ #else "select top 10 " + _ #endif #endif "p_strNrDok as nr , " + _ "p_dDataWyst as data, " + _ "p_idobj as id, " + _ "n5opakowanie_produktu.strNazwa as opak , " + _ "c_curIloscOpak as ilosc , " + _ "c_pzam_curIloscOpakZreal as ilosc_z , " + _ "jednostka.strSkrot as je ," + _ "klient.strNazwa as c_klient_nazwa, " + _ "p_pKlient as c_klient_idobj, " + _ "jednostka.nDokladnosc as je_prec ," + _ "waluta.strSkrot as wal, " + _ "t_dokhandl.c_curiloscopakpoz as ilosc_poz " + _ #ifdef _ABAKOSTEEL ",case when p_enettobrutto = 1 then c_curcenanettowal else c_curcenabruttowal end as cena_zam " + _ #endif "from vlist_n5zamowienie_listPozycje as t_dokhandl " + _ "join n5opakowanie_produktu on t_dokhandl.c_pOpak = n5opakowanie_produktu.idobj " + _ "join n5jednostka as jednostka on n5opakowanie_produktu.pJednOpak = jednostka.idobj " + _ "join n5jednostka as waluta on t_dokhandl.p_pWaluta = waluta.idobj " + _ "join n5klient as klient on t_dokhandl.p_pKlient = klient.idobj " +_ #ifdef _DREWTUR "where t_dokhandl.c_pProdukt = %1 " + _ #else "where t_dokhandl.c_pProdukt = %1 and c_curIloscOpak <> c_pzam_curIloscOpakZreal " + _ #endif "and p_pRejestrDok in (select idobj from n5rejestrdok where eTyp = N5REJESTRDOK__ZAM_OBCE) " + _ #ifdef _ABAKUS strWhere +_ #endif "order by p_dDataWyst desc , p_strNrDok , n5opakowanie_produktu.strNazwa ") _ .add(CStr(pProdukt.idobj)) _ .done() end function
function sql_for_zam_wl2(byval pProdukt)
sql_for_zam_wl2 = doc_.afc.convert.formatter( _ #ifdef _IOW "select " + _ #else "select top 10 " + _ #endif "p_strNrDok as nr , " + _ "p_dDataWyst as data, " + _ "p_idobj as id, " + _ "n5opakowanie_produktu.strNazwa as opak , " + _ "c_curIloscOpak as ilosc , " + _ "c_pzam_curIloscOpakZreal as ilosc_z , " + _ "jednostka.strSkrot as je ," + _ "klient.strNazwa as c_klient_nazwa, " + _ "p_pKlient as c_klient_idobj, " + _ "jednostka.nDokladnosc as je_prec ," + _ "waluta.strSkrot as wal, gk.strNazwa as gk_nazwa " + _ #ifdef _ABAKOSTEEL ",case when p_enettobrutto = 1 then c_curcenanettowal else c_curcenabruttowal end as cena_zam " + _ #endif "from vlist_n5zamowienie_listPozycje as t_dokhandl " + _ "join n5opakowanie_produktu on t_dokhandl.c_pOpak = n5opakowanie_produktu.idobj " + _ "join n5jednostka as jednostka on n5opakowanie_produktu.pJednOpak = jednostka.idobj " + _ "join n5jednostka as waluta on t_dokhandl.p_pWaluta = waluta.idobj " + _ "join n5klient as klient on t_dokhandl.p_pKlient = klient.idobj " +_ "join n5grupaklient gk on klient.pGrupaKlient = gk.IdObj " +_ "where t_dokhandl.c_pProdukt = %1 and c_curIloscOpak <> c_pzam_curIloscOpakZreal " + _ "and p_pRejestrDok in (select idobj from n5rejestrdok where eTyp = N5REJESTRDOK__ZAM_WLASNE) " + _ "order by p_dDataWyst, p_idobj ") _ .add(CStr(pProdukt.idobj)) _ .done() end function
function sql_for_rezerwacje(byval pProdukt)
#ifdef _ABAKUS dim strWhere: strWhere = "" if HARUI_FREE(UAR_OGRANICZONY_DOSTEP_DANE_KLIENTA) then strWhere = _ "and n5klient.idobj in " + _ "(select IdObj from n5klient where pPracownik in " + _ "(select n5pracownik.idobj from n5uzytkownik " + _ "inner join n5wykonawca on n5uzytkownik.pWykonawca = n5wykonawca.idobj " + _ "inner join n5pracownik on n5wykonawca.wrefObiekt = n5pracownik.idobj and n5wykonawca.wrefObiekt_wrt = TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK " + _ "where n5uzytkownik.idobj = " + CStr(getCurrentUserID()) + ")) " end if #endif sql_for_rezerwacje = doc_.afc.convert.formatter( _ "select " + _ "vlist.p_ddatawyst as data, " + _ "vlist.p_strNrdok as nr, " + _ "p_idobj as id, " +_ "n5klient.strNazwa as klient_nazwa, " + _ "n5klient.IdObj as klient_idobj, " + _ "vlist.c_curiloscopak as ilosc, "+ _ "vlist.p_ddatarezerw as data_rezerw, " +_ "vlist.p_tczasrezerw as czas " + _ "from vlist_n5dokmag_listpozycje vlist " + _ "inner join n5klient on vlist.p_pKlient = n5klient.idobj " + _ "where p_idobj not in (select pDokMag from n5dokmag where nTypDok=N5REJESTRDOK_ZAK_REZERWACJI) " + _ "and p_nTypDok=N5REJESTRDOK_REZERWACJE and c_pProdukt = %1 " + _ #ifdef _ABAKUS strWhere +_ #endif "order by vlist.p_ddatawyst" ) _ .add(CStr(pProdukt.idobj)) _ .done()
end function
function sql_for_zamwlasne( byval pProdukt) #ifdef _ABAKUS sql_for_zamwlasne = doc_.afc.convert.formatter( _ " select 'c_pOpak'=max(pom.c_pOpak),'je'=max(pom.je),'je_prec'=max(pom.je_prec),'opak'=max(pom.opak),'data'=pom.data, " + vbNewLine +_ " 'ilosc_wlasne'=sum(pom.ilosc_wlasne),'ilosc_obce'=sum(pom.ilosc_obce) " + vbNewLine +_ " from " + vbNewLine +_ " (select c_pOpak , max(strSkrot) as je , max(nDokladnosc) as je_prec , max(n5opakowanie_produktu.strNazwa) as opak, " + vbNewLine +_ " c_pzam_dDataReal as data , 'ilosc_wlasne'=sum(c_curIloscOpakPoz),'ilosc_obce'=0 " + vbNewLine +_ " from vlist_n5zamowienie_listPozycje " + vbNewLine +_ " join n5opakowanie_produktu on vlist_n5zamowienie_listPozycje.c_pOpak = n5opakowanie_produktu.idobj " + vbNewLine +_ " join n5jednostka as jednostka on n5opakowanie_produktu.pJednOpak = jednostka.idobj " + vbNewLine +_ " where c_pProdukt = %1 and p_pRejestrDok in (select idobj from n5rejestrdok where eTyp = N5REJESTRDOK__ZAM_WLASNE) and c_curIloscOpakPoz > 0 " + vbNewLine +_ " group by c_pzam_dDataReal , c_pOpak " + vbNewLine +_ " union " + vbNewLine +_ " select c_pOpak , max(strSkrot) as je , max(nDokladnosc) as je_prec , max(n5opakowanie_produktu.strNazwa) as opak, " + vbNewLine +_ " c_pzam_dDataReal as data ,'ilosc_wlasne'=0, 'ilosc_obce'=sum(c_curIloscOpakPoz) " + vbNewLine +_ " from vlist_n5zamowienie_listPozycje " + vbNewLine +_ " join n5opakowanie_produktu on vlist_n5zamowienie_listPozycje.c_pOpak = n5opakowanie_produktu.idobj " + vbNewLine +_ " join n5jednostka as jednostka on n5opakowanie_produktu.pJednOpak = jednostka.idobj " + vbNewLine +_ " where c_pProdukt = %1 and p_pRejestrDok in (select idobj from n5rejestrdok where eTyp = N5REJESTRDOK__ZAM_OBCE) and c_curIloscOpakPoz > 0 " + vbNewLine +_ " group by c_pzam_dDataReal , c_pOpak) as pom " + vbNewLine +_ " group by pom.data " + vbNewLine +_ " order by pom.data" + _ " " ) _ .add(cstr(pProdukt.idobj)) _ .done() #else sql_for_zamwlasne = doc_.afc.convert.formatter( _ " select " + _ " c_pOpak ," + _ " max(strSkrot) as je , " + _ " max(nDokladnosc) as je_prec , " + _ " max(n5opakowanie_produktu.strNazwa) as opak , " + _ " c_pzam_dDataReal as data ," + _ " sum(c_curIloscOpakPoz) as ilosc " + _ " from vlist_n5zamowienie_listPozycje " + _ " join n5opakowanie_produktu on vlist_n5zamowienie_listPozycje.c_pOpak = n5opakowanie_produktu.idobj " + _ " join n5jednostka as jednostka on n5opakowanie_produktu.pJednOpak = jednostka.idobj " + _ " where c_pProdukt = %1 " + _ " and p_pRejestrDok in (select idobj from n5rejestrdok where eTyp = N5REJESTRDOK__ZAM_WLASNE) " + _ " and c_curIloscOpakPoz > 0 " + _ " group by c_pzam_dDataReal , c_pOpak " + _ " order by c_pzam_dDataReal" + _ " " ) _ .add(cstr(pProdukt.idobj)) _ .add(doc_.afc.convert.Date2Sql(trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY)) ) _ .done() #endif
#ifdef _DEBUG 'trans_.message 1002 , 0 , "DEBUG: " + sql_for_zamwlasne #endif
end function
function sql_for_history(idProdukt)
sql_for_history = doc_.afc.convert.formatter( _ " select "+_ " 'pocz_obow'=t_0.dDataOd, "+_ " 'kon_obow'=t_0.dDataDo, "+_ " 'wart_ceny'=t_0.curCenaRab, "+_ " 'cur_date'=getdate(), "+_ " 'czy_aktualna'=(case when ('cur_date' between 'pocz_obow' and 'kon_obow') then 1 else 0 end) "+_ " from n5polrab t_0 "+_ " where "+_ " t_0.wpProdGrupa = '%1' and "+_ " t_0.eTyp = N5POLRAB_TYP_CENA_BRUTTO and "+_ " t_0.dDataOd is not null and "+_ " t_0.dDataDo is not null "+_ " union "+_ " select "+_ " 'pocz_obow'=null, "+_ " 'kon_obow'=null, "+_ " 'wart_ceny'=t_1.curCenaBrutto1, "+_ " 'cur_date'=getdate(), "+_ " 'czy_aktualna'=(case when 'cur_date' between 'pocz_obow' and 'kon_obow' then 1 else 0 end) "+_ " from n5opakowanie_produktu t_1 "+_ " join collections on t_1.idobj=collections.IdObj and collections.idcollection = 10131012 "+_ " join n5produkt t_2 on t_2.idobj=collections.idparent "+_ " where t_2.IdObj = '%1' "+_ " order by 'pocz_obow' desc, 'kon_obow' desc " ) _ .add(idProdukt) _ .done()
end function
'******************************************************************************************************* 'funkcja generująca tabelkę z historią cen danego produktu '******************************************************************************************************* sub plug_produkt_historia_cen(byref pContainer,byval idProdukt) pContainer.removeall dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.backcolor = RGB(255,255,255) pPlugInTable.forecolor = RGB(0,0,0) pPlugInTable.border = 1
dim row dim cell dim par
dim oRecordset set oRecordset=trans_.createadors(sql_for_history(idProdukt))
dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
'Jeśli zapytanie nie zwróci żadnych wynikow, wyswietlamy komunikat, że nie ma takiego produktu, 'w przeciwnym razie rysujemy wiersz naglowkowy opisujacy kolumny tabeli if oRecordset.eof then set row = pPlugInTable.addnew(23,-1).addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLEROW,-1) 'set cell = pTB.newrow.newcell 'cell.alignment = "center" set cell = row.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLECELL,-1) set par = cell.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1) par.text = "Brak produktu o podanym kodzie kreskowym!" exit sub else set row = pPlugInTable.addnew(23,-1).addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLEROW,-1) row.border = 1 row.backcolor = HEAD_ROW_COLOR set cell = row.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLECELL,-1) set par = cell.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1) par.text = "Od dnia" set cell = row.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLECELL,-1) set par = cell.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1) par.text = "Do dnia" set cell = row.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLECELL,-1) set par = cell.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1) par.text = "Cena" end if
'Ustawiamy zmienną mowiacą, czy już znaleziono aktualną cenę dim nie_zrobiono : nie_zrobiono = true
while not oRecordset.eof 'tworzymy nowy wiersz set row = pPlugInTable.addnew(23,-1).addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLEROW,-1)
'jeśli cena jest ceną aktualną, ustawiamy kolor tła na inny. Jest tak albo wtedy, gdy pole 'czy_aktualna jes tustawione na 1 (ustawiona cena początkowa i koncowa i bieżąca data 'zawiera się miedzy nimi) albo gdy biezaca data wpada w ktorys z przedziałow tworzonych 'przez daty poczatkowe (tak bywa, jesli daty koncowe nie sa ustawiane) if (oRecordset.fields("czy_aktualna").value = 1) and nie_zrobiono then row.backcolor = CURRENT_PRICE_COLOR row.bold = true nie_zrobiono = false end if if not isNull(oRecordset.fields("pocz_obow").value) then if (oRecordset.fields("pocz_obow").value <= oRecordset.fields("cur_date").value) and nie_zrobiono then row.backcolor = CURRENT_PRICE_COLOR row.bold = true nie_zrobiono = false end if else if nie_zrobiono then row.backcolor = CURRENT_PRICE_COLOR row.bold = true nie_zrobiono = false end if end if
'tworzymy nową komórkę oraz element static do przechowywania daty początku obowiązywania ceny set cell = row.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLECELL,-1) set par = cell.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1)
if not isNull(oRecordset.fields("pocz_obow").value) then 'cell.alignment = "center" par.text = trans_.afc.display.fulldate(oRecordset.fields("pocz_obow").value) else par.text = "????-??-??" 'set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable) 'set cell = pTB.newrow 'cel.text = "-" 'cell.forecolor = 12736 'cell.backcolor = "yellow" 'cell.alignment = "center" end if
'tworzymy nową komórkę oraz element static do przechowywania daty końca obowiązywania ceny set cell = row.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLECELL,-1) set par = cell.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1)
if not isNull(oRecordset.fields("kon_obow").value) then par.text = trans_.afc.display.fulldate(oRecordset.fields("kon_obow").value) else par.text = "????-??-??" end if
'tworzymy nową komórkę oraz element static do przechowywania wartości ceny set cell = row.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLECELL,-1) set par = cell.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1) par.text = trans_.afc.display.money(oRecordset.fields("wart_ceny").value, "")
oRecordset.movenext wend
end sub
class CIloscOpak public m_idOpak public m_strOpak public m_curIlosc public m_pJednostka
end class
dim g_arrayIlosc:set g_arrayIlosc = nothing
public function get_by_opak(idOpak):set get_by_opak = nothing dim iter for iter = 0 to g_arrayIlosc.UpperIndex() if g_arrayIlosc.value(iter).m_idOpak = idOpak then set get_by_opak = g_arrayIlosc.value(iter) end if next end function
